title: A Nameless Country in the Snow
description: On pages 7–10, a nameless country in the snow as dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues.
scene: A Nameless Country in the Snow. Dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: You can use the bed over there.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I'll go heat up the room right now...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: drum island captain of the civilian militia Dalton

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: My apologies for the belated introduction...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: My name is Dalton and it is my job to guard this island.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask you one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Please forgive our hostile welcome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: I get the feeling,

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: that I've seen you before some- where...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Y-you must be imagining things. I'm sure we've never met before... more importantly, could you please tell us more about this witch...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A fever of... 42 degrees!?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Her fever's been rising steadily since 3 days ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it rises any higher, she'll lose her life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, but I'm afraid we don't know what the cause of her disease is, nor how to treat it...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if this doctor's a witch or whatever as long as she can cure Nami! So just where the hell is she!?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: From the window...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You should be able to see mountains...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, you mean those extremely tall-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Look at my Mr. Hyper- Snowman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Clap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And my snow- Zilla!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's it! I'm kicking both your asses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those mountains are called the drum Rockies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Perhaps you can see a castle at the top of the tallest mountain in the middle?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pre- sently... It's a castle with no king...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Castle?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Ahh, nice and warm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, I can see it alright...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So what about that castle...?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Dr. Kureha, the lone doctor in this entire country whom the people call a witch,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: lives in that very castle situated on the mountaintop.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What!?

summary: This part centers on a nameless country in the snow, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
